verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Change My Heart, I Pray, Stir My Heart Again To Pray, Blessed Holy Spirit, Come Upon Me Now Again Today.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come Upon Me Now, Come Upon Me Now, As I Sing Your Praise.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let Me Draw Nearer, Let Me Draw Nearer, Let Me Draw Nearer, Nearer To You.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Set My Heart On Fire, Lord, Set My Heart On Fire.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Set My Heart On Fire, As I Draw Nearer, Nearer To You.
